# agentagon/core/types/

Reusable type definitions for JSON payloads and signal analysis results.

## Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `__init__.py` | Marks this directory as a shared type package. |
| `json.py` | JSON type aliases and canonical JSON serialization helpers. |

## Folders

| Folder | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| [`signals/`](signals/) | Signal value, context, callback, and summary dataclasses. |
